channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: JetBrains OS Integration - Thu May 07 14:54:38 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides operating system integration and jetbrains:// protocol handler support, enabling interaction between your IDE and external developer productivity tools.
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.intellij.platform.daemon

item.title: GoIT Tracker - Tue May 05 23:16:54 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: gorvic downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: ua.goit.ide.tracker

item.title: Brogrammer - Wed May 06 15:35:37 UTC 2026

item.description:

item.title: Turborepo Assistant - Mon May 04 19:41:24 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.description:
